text: Romanian intelligence files showed that 25,000 pro-Georgescu TikTok accounts became highly active in the fortnight before the first round, many created or managed by troll farms using Turkish IP addresses and Russian email services, generating more than 2 million comments. The supply-side structure relied on fake engagement providers and third-party services that specialize in building and selling networks of accounts. Important hybrid linkage with parallel cyber-attacks on Romania's electoral IT infrastructure was rarely explained in mainstream coverage.
